description: Record Founder appointment of Assembly Member AiiDs (Seat 1: gpt_librarian, Seat 2: claude_proposer). Update docs/aiid_registry.md. Two trace_events: aiid_appointed x2.

## Notes

- Existing agent_id values (claude_proposer, claude_registrar) are
  recognized as valid AiiD identifiers per P-20260313-002 section 4.4.
- Registry entries are Institutional State Snapshots (Layer B).
  Authoritative records are trace_events (Layer A).
- Updates to this registry require a Registrar task following
  Librarian review.
